history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man, appearing to be in his late teens or early twenties, is slumped over on a public bench outdoors, his head resting on his arm, conveying a sense of exhaustion or sadness. He's wearing a black hooded sweatshirt and dark grey jeans, paired with black canvas sneakers with white laces and accents. A black backpack with orange trim is placed next to him on the bench.

The setting appears to be a public waiting area, possibly a bus stop or train station, with a yellow-lined platform visible underfoot. A metal fence with decorative circular elements runs along the background. Beyond the fence, there are trees with thin, dry-looking branches, some greenery, and hints of buildings with red water tanks.

A light pole stands to the right of the man, adorned with a sticker featuring a logo with the infinity symbol, the text "Adakita," and "TERPERCAYA!!!" (meaning "Trusted!!!") in Indonesian, along with a QR code. The lighting suggests it's late afternoon or early evening, with warm, golden sunlight casting long shadows and illuminating the scene from the side, creating a slightly melancholic or peaceful atmosphere. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by earthy tones, greys, blacks, and the warm glow of the sun. The style is candid and slightly moody, capturing a quiet moment of stillness.
